display_name: Premium positive-selection — champion_defender_v4's EXACT stack (10-filter defender + WR-preserving exits, no stall) with ONE variable changed: triggers_allowed restricted to the two held-out-validated premium triggers deep_1h_dip + pullback_in_uptrend. Held-out (05-16..24 train / 05-27..29 test): these two carry a DURABLE win-rate edge (TEST 56% WR vs fleet 47% = +9pp; pullback 59%, deep_1h_dip 55%) in BOTH regimes. The +$/tr was regime-specific (calm-window inflated; raw triggers went -$/tr in the brutal TEST regime) — converting the validated WR edge into +$/tr is the job of the defender stack + tight exits, measured FORWARD. A/B control = champion_defender_v4 (same stack, all triggers). Judge at n>=50 with --unrealized.
